title: Z@buwluwn #2074
definition:
Zebulun = "exalted"

 n pr m
 1) the 10th of the sons of Jacob, 6th and last of Leah; progenitor
    of Zebulun
 2) the tribe descended from Zebulun

 n pr loc
 3) the land allocated to the tribe of Zebulun
nasbUsage:

 n pr m

    of Zebulun

 n pr loc

    NASB:  a son of Jacob, also his desc. and their territory
